## What changed?


## Risk level

- [ ] Low: copy, docs, styling, tests only
- [ ] Medium: app logic, validation, routing, dependencies
- [ ] High: auth, database, migrations, CI/CD, deployment, secrets, tenant isolation, certificate generation, signing, or data retention

## Checks

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks locally
- [ ] I considered privacy/data exposure
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behaviour changed
